---
title: "Brush gallery"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
params:
  brushes: "best"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(mypaintr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.ext = "png",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 5
)

sample_brushes <- c(
  "classic/charcoal",
  "classic/pen",
  "classic/textured_ink",
  "deevad/chalk",
  "experimental/bubble",
  "experimental/pixelblocking",
  "experimental/spaced-blot",
  "ramon/Thin_Pen",
  "tanda/marker-05",
  "tanda/pencil-8b"
)

best_brushes <- c(
  "classic/charcoal",
  "classic/coarse_bulk_1",
  "classic/coarse_bulk_2",
  "classic/coarse_bulk_3",
  "classic/dry_brush",
  "classic/ink_blot",
  "classic/ink_eraser",
  "classic/kabura",
  "classic/pen",
  "classic/pencil",
  "classic/slow_ink",
  "classic/textured_ink",
  "deevad/2B_pencil",
  "deevad/4H_pencil",
  "deevad/chalk",
  "deevad/spray2",
  "Dieterle/HalfToneCMY#1",
  "Dieterle/Pencil-_Left_Handed",
  "Dieterle/Posterizer",
  "experimental/bubble",
  "experimental/track",
  "experimental/pixelblocking",
  "experimental/sewing",
  "experimental/small_blot",
  "experimental/spaced-blot",
  "experimental/speed_blot",
  "experimental/subtle_pencil",
  "kaerhon_v1/inkster_l",
  "ramon/2B_pencil",
  "ramon/B-pencil",
  "ramon/P._Shade",
  "ramon/Pastel_1",
  "ramon/Pen",
  "ramon/Sketch_1",
  "ramon/Thin_Pen",
  "tanda/acrylic-05-paint",
  "tanda/charcoal-01",
  "tanda/charcoal-03",
  "tanda/charcoal-04",
  "tanda/marker-01",
  "tanda/marker-05",
  "tanda/oil-06-paint",
  "tanda/pencil-2b",
  "tanda/pencil-8b"
)

brush_set <- switch(
  params$brushes,
  sample = sample_brushes,
  best = best_brushes,
  all = brushes(),
  stop("params$brushes must be one of 'sample', 'best', or 'all'")
)

right_preview_scale <- 1

slugify <- function(x) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "-", x)

html_escape <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("&", "&amp;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("<", "&lt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub(">", "&gt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\"", "&quot;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x
}

find_preview <- function(brush) {
  for (base in brush_dirs()) {
    candidate <- file.path(base, paste0(brush, "_prev.png"))
    if (file.exists(candidate)) {
      return(candidate)
    }
  }
  NULL
}

render_brush_a <- function(brush, path) {
  mypaint_device(path)
  plot.new()
  plot.window(c(0, 10), c(0, 10))
  title("Strokes")
  rect(1, 0, 4, 10, col = "#ffc0cb", border = NA)
  rect(4, 0, 7, 10, col = "#fffcf8", border = NA)
  rect(7, 0, 10, 10, col = "#7e3f12", border = NA)
  set_brush(brush)
  set_hand(human_hand(pressure_taper = 1))
  segments(1, 1:9, 10, 1:9, lwd = (1:9) / 2,
           col = adjustcolor("darkred", alpha.f = 0.66))
  dev.off()
}

render_brush_b <- function(brush, path) {
  mypaint_device(path)
  plot.new()
  plot.window(c(0, 10), c(0, 10))
  title("Fills")
  set_brush(brush)
  rect(2, 2, 7, 7, col = "red")
  lines(c(1, 9), c(1, 9), col = "blue", lwd = 2)
  draw_rough_rect(1, 4, 4, 9, fill_pattern = zigzag(), col = "orange3", lwd = 2)
  draw_rough_lines(c(0.5, 9.5), c(9.5, 9.5), hand = human_hand(pressure_taper = 1))
  dev.off()
}
```

This vignette compares installed MyPaint brush previews with two
`mypaintr` render scenes. Use the `brushes` parameter to control which set is
rendered:

- `"sample"`: ten hand-picked good brushes
- `"best"`: the brushes recommended in the introduction vignette
- `"all"`: every installed brush

```{r gallery, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
input_name <- knitr::current_input()
if (is.null(input_name) || !nzchar(input_name)) {
  input_name <- "brush-gallery.Rmd"
}

fig_dir <- file.path(
  paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(input_name)), "_files"),
  "brush-gallery"
)
fig_root <- paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(input_name)), "_files")
preview_dir <- file.path(fig_dir, "previews")
render_dir <- file.path(fig_dir, "renders")

dir.create(preview_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(render_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

rows <- lapply(brush_set, function(brush) {
  slug <- slugify(brush)
  preview_src <- find_preview(brush)
  preview_rel <- NA_character_
  render_a_rel <- file.path(fig_root, "brush-gallery", "renders", paste0(slug, "-a.png"))
  render_b_rel <- file.path(fig_root, "brush-gallery", "renders", paste0(slug, "-b.png"))
  render_a_abs <- file.path(render_dir, paste0(slug, "-a.png"))
  render_b_abs <- file.path(render_dir, paste0(slug, "-b.png"))
  render_a_error <- NULL
  render_b_error <- NULL

  if (!is.null(preview_src)) {
    preview_rel <- file.path(fig_root, "brush-gallery", "previews", paste0(slug, ".png"))
    file.copy(preview_src, file.path(preview_dir, paste0(slug, ".png")), overwrite = TRUE)
  }

  tryCatch(
    render_brush_a(brush, render_a_abs),
    error = function(e) {
      render_a_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
      if (dev.cur() > 1) try(dev.off(), silent = TRUE)
    }
  )

  tryCatch(
    render_brush_b(brush, render_b_abs),
    error = function(e) {
      render_b_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
      if (dev.cur() > 1) try(dev.off(), silent = TRUE)
    }
  )

  list(
    brush = brush,
    preview_rel = preview_rel,
    render_a_rel = render_a_rel,
    render_b_rel = render_b_rel,
    render_a_error = render_a_error,
    render_b_error = render_b_error
  )
})

row_html <- vapply(rows, function(row) {
  preview_html <- if (is.na(row$preview_rel)) {
    "<div class='missing'>No installed preview found</div>"
  } else {
    sprintf("<img src='%s' alt='%s preview'>", row$preview_rel, html_escape(row$brush))
  }

  render_a_html <- if (is.null(row$render_a_error)) {
    sprintf("<img src='%s' alt='%s strokes'>", row$render_a_rel, html_escape(row$brush))
  } else {
    sprintf("<div class='missing'>Render failed:<br><code>%s</code></div>", html_escape(row$render_a_error))
  }

  render_b_html <- if (is.null(row$render_b_error)) {
    sprintf("<img src='%s' alt='%s fills'>", row$render_b_rel, html_escape(row$brush))
  } else {
    sprintf("<div class='missing'>Render failed:<br><code>%s</code></div>", html_escape(row$render_b_error))
  }

  sprintf(
    paste0(
      "<section class='row'>",
      "<h2>%s</h2>",
      "<div class='grid'>",
      "<figure><figcaption>Installed preview</figcaption>%s</figure>",
      "<figure class='mypaintr-output'><figcaption>mypaintr strokes</figcaption>%s</figure>",
      "<figure class='mypaintr-output'><figcaption>mypaintr fills</figcaption>%s</figure>",
      "</div>",
      "</section>"
    ),
    html_escape(row$brush),
    preview_html,
    render_a_html,
    render_b_html
  )
}, character(1))

cat(sprintf(
  paste0(
    "<div class='gallery-note'>",
    "Showing <strong>%d</strong> brushes from the <code>%s</code> set.",
    "</div>",
    "<style>",
    "body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;}",
    ".gallery-note{margin:0 0 20px 0;}",
    ".row{margin:0 0 32px 0;padding:0 0 24px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;}",
    ".grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:24px;align-items:start;}",
    "figure{margin:0;}",
    "figcaption{font-weight:600;margin-bottom:8px;}",
    "img{max-width:100%%;height:auto;border:1px solid #ddd;background:#fff;}",
    ".mypaintr-output img{max-width:%.0f%%;}",
    ".missing{padding:32px;border:1px dashed #bbb;color:#666;background:#fafafa;}",
    "@media (max-width: 1000px){.grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}",
    "</style>",
    "%s"
  ),
  length(brush_set),
  html_escape(params$brushes),
  100 * right_preview_scale,
  paste(row_html, collapse = "\n")
))
```
